Later, as they make their way to the parking lot, Leon jokes, "Just gotta get pucks deep. Keep up the energy, play a full sixty minutes." He bumps Connor with his shoulder.

Laughing, Connor bumps him back. "Yeah, yeah, let's see how good an answer you can come up with next time they ask you if you think it helps to have good goaltending."

"Just say 'yes' and stare them down until they go away," Leon suggests. "Brunch tomorrow, yeah? Nursey's paying, he still owes us from cards on the plane."

코너는 동의하고 작별 인사를 한 뒤 집으로 향했다. 승리한 날 밤에는 바로 잠이 오지 않았고, 오늘 밤은 기분도 꽤 좋았다. 어쩌면 그래서 마침내 성매매 종사자를 고용하기 위해 만든 가짜 이메일 계정을 열 용기를 냈는지도 모른다.
